description_long: This electric fan features a minimalist, industrial design with a cylindrical central support column connecting a round, flat base to a circular top platform. Two elongated, flat blades extend horizontally from the central hub, giving the fan a streamlined, modern appearance. The blades are wide and slightly tapered at the ends, suggesting efficient air movement. The entire object appears to be constructed from a metallic or high-grade plastic material with a smooth, matte finish. There is no visible blade guard, exposing the blades for maximum airflow, and no power cord or control panel is apparent. The fan's compact and sturdy build makes it suitable for placement in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, minimalist electric fan with two wide, flat blades extending from a central cylindrical support and a round base, finished in a smooth, metallic material. The design is open with no visible blade guard or controls.
description_view_0: The fan is seen at an angle, showing the round top, central support, and one blade extending forward while the other is partially visible behind.
description_view_1: A side view highlights both blades fully extended horizontally, with the central support and round top and base clearly visible.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0 but from the opposite angle, showing the other blade in the foreground and the round top and base.
description_view_3: A direct side view, displaying both blades in full extension and the cylindrical support structure.
attribute_blade_guard_design: No blade guard is present; the blades are fully exposed with an open frame design.
